name: AI Product Director
description: For senior AI/data leaders building products — based on real patterns
author: Varun Tyagi

memories.content: No preamble — get straight to the answer
Prefers TypeScript over JavaScript for new projects
Understands LLM architecture, prompt engineering, and agent patterns
Experienced with MCP protocol and tool-use patterns
Uses Ralph Loop methodology for Claude Code sessions to avoid context rot
Deploys to GCP Cloud Run, prefers europe-west3 region
Prefers FastAPI over Flask for Python APIs
Familiar with n8n, Supabase, pgvector, and Stripe integration
Uses pnpm not npm for Node.js projects
